title: Glick Plain Luxury Tissue Wrapping Paper, Suitable for Gift Wrapping and Other Arts & Crafts, 4 Sheets 50 x 70 cms When Opened, Violet Purple
features: LUXURY TISSUE PAPER: Suitable for gift wrapping and many types of arts & crafts and gives that extra special luxury feel to the tissue.
WIDE USE: This tissue paper is perfect to use for wrapping or protecting many different types of gifts and of course for using in arts and crafts and decoupage

CELEBRATIONS & JUBILATIONS. This tissue paper is perfect for him/her on any special day. It comes with four sheets and can be used for many celebrations. Please note that this may come packaged in cello or kraft packaging as we rotate through our stock.
DIMENSIONS: The dimensions of the tissue sheets when opened are are 500m x 750mm. Perfect for most types of gifts, and allows gift wrapping to be done with ease. Each pack contains four sheets.
description: From the manufacturer Glick Our product range includes innovative high quality printed Gift Wrap, Gift Tags, Gift Bags, Roll Wrap, Ribbons, Bows, Tissue Papers and Stationery for all seasons and occasions. About Us Our Customers include some of the world’s top Departmental Stores and Boutiques as well as Gift and Card Shops across the UK and worldwide . We are based in Bradford, West Yorkshire.
